item.description:

Deep learning

  • red-chainerstars95 - Deep learning framework for Ruby.
  • torch-rbstars347 - Ruby bindings for LibTorchstars48.1k using ricestars299.
  • mxnetstars49 - Ruby bindings for mxnet.

item.title: arbox/machine-learning-with-ruby Aug 21st, 2019
item.description:

Gradient boosting

  • xgbooststars18 — Ruby bindings for XGBoost. [dep: XGBoost]
  • xgbstars58 — Ruby bindings for XGBoost. [dep: XGBoost]
  • lightgbmstars54 — Ruby bindings for LightGBM. [dep: LightGBM]

    • Related Resources

  • LightGBMstars12.5k
  • XGBooststars21k

item.title: arbox/machine-learning-with-ruby Jun 1st, 2019
item.description:
Machine Learning Libraries

Deep learning

  • tensorflowstars829 - Ruby bindings for TensorFlow.

    • Machine Learning Libraries

    Frameworks

  • epsstars544 - Bayesian Classification and Linear Regression with exports using PMML and an alternative backend using [GSL][gsl].

item.title: arbox/machine-learning-with-ruby May 31st, 2019
item.description:
Machine Learning Libraries

Frameworks

  • rumalestars534 - Machine Learninig toolkit in Ruby with wide range of implemented algorithms (SVM, Logistic Regression, Linear Regression, Random Forest etc.) and interfaces similar to [Scikit-Learn][scikit] in Python.

item.description:

  • tensor_streamstars499 - Ground-up and standalone reimplementation of TensorFlow for Ruby.

    • Related Resources

  • scikit-learn algorithm cheatsheet

item.title: arbox/machine-learning-with-ruby Jun 3rd, 2018
item.description:
Articles, Posts, Talks, and Presentations

  • 2018
    • Deep Learning Programming on Ruby by Kenta Murata & Yusaku Hatanaka [slides | page]
    • How to use trained Keras and TensorFlow machine learning models within Ruby on Rails by Denis Sellu [post]

item.title: arbox/machine-learning-with-ruby Apr 14th, 2018
item.description:
✨ Tutorials

  • How to evolve neural networks in Ruby using the Machine Learning Workbench

    • Machine Learning Libraries

    Frameworks

  • machine_learning_workbenchstars13 - Growing machine learning framework written in pure Ruby, high performance computing using Numo, CUDA bindings through Cumostars86. Currently implementating neural networks, evolutionary strategies, vector quantization, and plenty of examples and utilities.
  • Deep NeuroEvolutionstars123 - Experimental setup based on the machine_learning_workbenchstars13 towards searching for deep neural networks (rather than training) using evolutionary algorithms. Applications to the OpenAI Gymstars24.1k using PyCallstars780.

    • Machine Learning Libraries

    Neural networks

  • machine_learning_workbench - Framework including pure-Ruby implementation of both feed-forward and recurrent neural networks (fully connected). Training available using neuroevolution (Natural Evolution Strategies algorithms).

    • Machine Learning Libraries

    Evolutionary algorithms

  • machine_learning_workbench - Framework including pure-Ruby implementations of Natural Evolution Strategy algorithms (black-box optimization), specifically Exponential NES (XNES), Separable NES (sNES), Block-Diagonal NES (BDNES) and more. Applications include neural network search/training (neuroevolution).

item.title: arbox/machine-learning-with-ruby Dec 14th, 2017
item.description:
Machine Learning Libraries

Neural networks

  • rannstars3 - Flexible Ruby ANN implementation with backprop (through-time, for recurrent nets), gradient checking, adagrad, and parallel batch execution.

item.title: arbox/machine-learning-with-ruby Oct 2nd, 2017
item.description:
✨ Tutorials

  • Using the Python scikit-learn machine learning library in Ruby using PyCall [codestars3]

item.title: arbox/machine-learning-with-ruby Sep 11th, 2017
item.description:
Books, Blogs, Channels

  • Practical Artificial Intelligence - Blog about Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning with tutorials and code samples in Ruby.

    • ✨ Tutorials

  • How to implement linear regression in Ruby [codestars5]
  • How to implement classification using logistic regression in Ruby
  • How to implement simple binary classification using a Neural Network in Ruby [codestars10]
  • How to implement classification using a SVM in Ruby [codestars5]
  • Unsupervised learning using k-means clustering in Ruby [codestars0]
  • Teaching an AI to play a simple game using Q-Learning in Ruby [codestars35]
  • Teaching a Neural Network to play a game using Q-Learning in Ruby [code]

item.title: arbox/machine-learning-with-ruby Jul 16th, 2017
item.description:

Frameworks

  • azure_mgmt_machine_learningstars263 - Machine Learning API of the Microsoft Azure.
  • aws-sdk-machinelearningstars3.3k - Machine Learning API of the Amazon Web Services.

item.title: arbox/machine-learning-with-ruby Jun 30th, 2017
item.description:
Machine Learning Libraries

Frameworks

  • shogunstars2.8k - Polyfunctional and mature machine learning toolbox with Ruby bindings.

item.title: arbox/machine-learning-with-ruby Jun 28th, 2017
item.description:
Machine Learning Libraries

Frameworks

  • data_modelerstars1 - Model your data with machine learning. Ample test coverage, examples to start fast, complete documentation. Production ready since 1.0.0.
  • rblearnstars1 - Feature Extraction and Crossvalidation library.
  • wekastars65 - JRuby bindings for Weka, different ML algorithms implemented through Weka.

item.title: arbox/machine-learning-with-ruby May 18th, 2017
item.description:
Machine Learning Libraries

Evolutionary algorithms

  • simple_gastars6 - Simplest Genetic Algorithms implementation in Ruby.

item.title: arbox/machine-learning-with-ruby May 16th, 2017
item.description:
Machine Learning Libraries

Frameworks

  • scorubystars66 - Ruby scoring API for PMML (Predictive Model Markup Language).
  • ai4rstars705 - Artificial Intelligence for Ruby.
  • classifier-rebornstars508 - General classifier module to allow Bayesian and other types of classifications. [dep: GLS]

    • Projects and Code Examples

  • simple_gastars6 - Basic (working) demo of Genetic Algorithms in Ruby.
  • Wine Clusteringstars0 - Wine quality estimations clustered with different algorithms.

    • Machine Learning Libraries

    Neural networks

  • cerebrumstars35 - Experimental implementation for Artificial Neural Networks in Ruby.
  • brainsstars59 - Feed-forward neural networks for JRuby based on brainsstars0.
  • neural-net-rubystars109 - Neural network written in Ruby.
  • ruby-fannstars428 - Ruby bindings to the Fast Artificial Neural Network Library (FANN).
  • tlearn-rbstars97 - Recurrent Neural Network library for Ruby.

    • Machine Learning Libraries

    Bayesian methods

  • linnaeusstars37 - Redis-backed Bayesian classifier.
  • naive_bayesstars45 - Simple Naive Bayes classifier.
  • nbayesstars146 - Full-featured, Ruby implementation of Naive Bayes.

    • Machine Learning Libraries

    Clustering

  • flannstars1.6k - Fast Library for Approximate Nearest Neighbors. [flann]
  • kmeans-clustererstars79 - k-means clustering in Ruby.
  • k_meansstars113 - Attempting to build a fast, memory efficient K-Means program.
  • knnstars35 - Simple K Nearest Neighbour Algorithm.

    • Machine Learning Libraries

    Linear classifiers

  • liblinear-ruby-swigstars82 - Ruby interface to LIBLINEAR (much more efficient than LIBSVM for text classification).
  • liblinear-rubystars84 - Ruby interface to LIBLINEAR using SWIG.

item.title: arbox/machine-learning-with-ruby Apr 26th, 2017
item.description:
Heroku buildpacks

  • GSL and Ruby buildpackstars3
  • OpenCV and Ruby buildpackstars3
  • ImageMagick buildpackstars43

    • Related Resources

  • OpenCV
  • Graphviz
  • Gnuplot
  • X11/XQuartz
  • ImageMagick
  • R
  • Octave

item.title: arbox/machine-learning-with-ruby Apr 24th, 2017
item.description:
Applications of machine learning

  • phashionstars678 - Ruby wrapper around pHash, the perceptual hash library for detecting duplicate multimedia files. [ImageMagick | libjpeg]

item.title: arbox/machine-learning-with-ruby Apr 21st, 2017
item.description:
Books, Blogs, Channels

  • Kirk, Matthew. Thoughtful Machine Learning: A Test-Driven Approach. O'Reilly, 2014. [Amazon | codestars126]

item.title: arbox/machine-learning-with-ruby Apr 20th, 2017
item.description:
Machine Learning Libraries

Kernel methods

  • rb-libsvmstars277 - Support Vector Machines with Ruby and the LIBSVM library. [dep: bundled]

    • Machine Learning Libraries

    Decision trees

  • decisiontreestars1.3k - Decision Tree ID3 Algorithm in pure Ruby. [dep: GraphViz | post].

    • Machine Learning Libraries

    Statistical models

  • rtimblstars5 - Memory based learners from the Timbl framework.
  • lda-rubystars132 - Ruby implementation of the LDA (Latent Dirichlet Allocation) for automatic Topic Modelling and Document Clustering.
  • maxent_string_classifierstars9 - JRuby maximum entropy classifier for string data, based on the OpenNLP Maxent framework.
  • omnicatstars10 - Generalized rack framework for text classifications.
  • omnicat-bayesstars30 - Naive Bayes text classification implementation as an OmniCat classifier strategy. [dep: bundled]

    • Articles, Posts, Talks, and Presentations

  • 2017
    • Scientific Computing on JRuby by Prasun Anand [slides | video | slides | slides]
    • Is it Food? An Introduction to Machine Learning by Matthew Mongeau [video | slides]
    • Bayes is BAE by Richard Schneeman [video | slides]
    • Ruby Roundtable: Machine Learning in Ruby by RubyThursday [video]
  • 2016
    • Practical Machine Learning with Ruby by Jordan Hudgens [tutorial]
    • Deep Learning: An Introduction for Ruby Developers by Geoffrey Litt [slides]
    • How I made a pure-Ruby word2vec program more than 3x faster by Kei Sawada [slides]
    • Dōmo arigatō, Mr. Roboto: Machine Learning with Ruby by Eric Weinstein [slides | video]
    • Building a Recommendation Engine with Machine Learning Techniques by Brian Sam-Bodden [video]
    • ✨ SciRuby Machine Learning: Current Status and Future by Kenta Murata [slides | video: jp]
    • Ruby Roundtable: Intro to Tensorflow by RubyThursday [video]
  • 2015
    • Machine Learning made simple with Ruby by Lorenzo Masini [post]
    • Using Ruby Machine Learning to Find Paris Hilton Quotes by Rick Carlino [tutorial]
  • 2014
    • Test Driven Neural Networks by Matthew Kirk [video]
    • Five machine learning techniques that you can use in your Ruby apps today by Benjamin Curtis [video | slides]
    • Machine Learning for Fun and Profit by John Paul Ashenfelter [video]
  • 2013
    • Sentiment Analysis using Support Vector Machines in Ruby by Matthew Kirk [video | codestars14]
    • Recommender Systems with Ruby by Marcel Caraciolo [slides]
    • Detecting Faces with Ruby: FFI in a Nutshell by Marc Berszick [post]
  • 2012
    • Machine Learning with Ruby, Part One by Vasily Vasinov [tutorial]
    • Recurrent Neural Networks in Ruby by Joseph Wilk [post]
    • Recommendation Engines using Machine Learning, and JRuby by Matthew Kirk [video]
    • Practical Machine Learning and Rails by Andrew Cantino and Ryan Stout [video]
  • 2011
    • Clustering in Ruby by Colin Drake [post]
    • Text Classification using Support Vector Machines in Ruby by Rimas Silkaitis [post]
  • 2010
    • bayes_motel – Bayesian classification for Ruby by Mike Perham [post]
    • Intelligent Ruby: Getting Started with Machine Learning by Ilya Grigorik [video]
  • 2009
  • 2008
    • Support Vector Machines (SVM) in Ruby by Ilya Grigorik [post]
  • 2007
    • Decision Tree Learning in Ruby by Ilya Grigorik [post]

    • Related Resources

  • Awesome Rubystars11.6k - Among other awesome items a short list of NLP related projects.
  • Ruby NLPstars1.2k - State-of-Art collection of Ruby libraries for NLP.
  • Speech and Natural Language Processingstars2k - General List of NLP related resources (mostly not for Ruby programmers).
  • Scientific Ruby - Linear Algebra, Visualization and Scientific Computing for Ruby.
  • Kibastars1.6k - Lightweight ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) pipeline.
  • Awesome OCRstars1.8k - Multitude of OCR (Optical Character Recognition) resources.
  • Awesome TensorFlowstars16.4k - Machine Learning with TensorFlow libraries.
  • rb-gslstars88 - Ruby interface to the GNU Scientific Library.
  • The Definitive Guide to Ruby's C API - Modern Reference and Tutorial on Embedding and Extending Ruby using C programming language.
